deploy.title: Deploy OpenClaw instance
deploy.description: Fill out the configuration and deploy your OpenClaw instance in seconds.

model.label: What model do you want to use?

communication.label: Which channel do you want to use for chatting?

steps.title: How to get your bot token?

step.3: Follow the prompts to name your bot and choose a username.
step.4: BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy the entire token (it looks like a long string of numbers and letters).
step.5: Paste the token in the field below and click Save & Connect.

note.pricing: $49 per month. Includes $15 in AI credits refreshed monthly.
note.signIn: Sign in to deploy your AI assistant and connect your channels.
note.invalid: Ensure all fields are filled correctly.

deploy.success: Deployment started. This can take a few moments to complete.

approve.success: Device approved successfully. You can now access dashboard from it.
Channel approved successfully. You can now chat with your assistant there.

error.alreadyExists: You already have an instance deployed. You can't deploy another one for now.
error.notFound: You don't have an instance deployed yet. Please deploy one first.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Your instance is live! Follow the steps below to start using it.
gettingStarted.dismiss: Got it, do not show again

steps.title: Open your instance
steps.description: Click the instance link above to open the OpenClaw control panel in a new tab.

steps.title: Wait for the pairing request
steps.description: When you open the panel, you will see "pairing required". This is normal — it is a security layer from OpenClaw.

steps.title: Approve the pairing here
steps.description: Return to this page. A request will appear in the "Pairing" section below this card. Click Approve.

steps.title: Connect your channel (Telegram/Discord/WhatsApp)
steps.description: Open your bot on the chosen channel and send any message. A new pairing request will appear here — approve it too.

steps.title: Done! Your assistant is ready
steps.description: After approving, you can already chat with your AI assistant through your chosen channel.

apiKeys.description: Manage the API keys used by your OpenClaw instance.
apiKeys.success: API Keys updated successfully. The container is being recreated.
apiKeys.error: Failed to update API Keys. Please try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription and billing details.
billing.required: An active subscription is required to deploy instances.
